game_info.title: "The Silk Pavilion",
game_info.concept: **盛世天下～女帝への道～ I** 盛世天下～女帝への道～ I is an interactive live-action drama where players influence the narrative by making choices at critical junctures. Gameplay involves watching 4K video segments, which periodically pause to present 2-4 on-screen dialogue or action options that players select by tapping. These choices directly impact the protagonist's "Charm," "Wisdom," and "Courage" stats, and determine the story's branching path, character relationships, and survival. The game features 16 chapters, with an "extremely high death rate" where incorrect choices lead to immediate "Game Over" states, requiring a restart from a checkpoint. Progression involves successfully navigating these choices to unlock subsequent chapters and advance the protagonist's journey to power, while collecting "exquisite items" and discovering "hidden stories" contribute to an achievement system.
game_info.description: Journey through ancient China as a young woman rising to power in "盛世天下～女帝への道～ I" (Path to Empress). Navigate 16 challenging chapters filled with critical choices that shape your destiny. Each decision affects your Charm, Wisdom, and Courage stats while determining survival. One wrong choice leads to immediate game over - choose wisely! Collect rare items, unlock hidden stories, and prove you have what it takes to become Empress. High difficulty, permadeath, and multiple branching paths await.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (↑/↓): Navigate through dialogue options
Space: Confirm selected choice
Z: View current stats and inventory
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Return to title screen after game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic navigation and choice selection mechanics. Validates that players can move through options and make selections using keyboard controls.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through available choices using arrow keys and select options using space. Cycle through all available options to ensure UI responds correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: All menu options should be accessible, selections should register properly, and the game should progress through at least one complete chapter without errors.

TEST_1.expected: All menu options should be accessible, selections should register properly, and the game should progress through at least one complete chapter without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal path to win the game by making strategically sound choices. Validates that the win condition (reaching Chapter 16 and making final correct choice) is achievable.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Make choices that balance all three stats (Charm, Wisdom, Courage) while prioritizing survival. Select options based on context clues and stat requirements for upcoming challenges.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate all 16 chapters, maintain balanced stats above critical thresholds, survive all death scenarios, and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests immediate death scenarios and game over handling. Validates that poor choices lead to appropriate consequences and restart mechanics work.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately make risky or obviously poor choices to trigger death scenarios. Test that game over screen appears and restart functionality works.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game should enter GAME_OVER_LOSE state when fatal choices are made, display appropriate death message, and allow restart via R key.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests stat tracking and item collection systems. Validates that choices properly modify stats and items are correctly added to inventory.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Stats should change by appropriate amounts based on choice consequences. Items should appear in inventory and be trackable throughout the game.
